title: Achievements
description: Understand achievement milestones and practical ways to approach them in regular play.

sections.heading: Achievements
paragraphs: Understand achievement milestones and practical ways to approach them in regular play.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake achievements
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements give ZXSnake players optional goals beyond a single run or match.
body: This matters because players often want a reason to revisit the game after learning the basics. Achievement goals add structure without changing the core arcade loop.
Players use this page after playing to understand which progress surfaces are supported and how achievements relate to regular sessions.
bullets: Connects repeat play to optional goals.
Keeps achievement wording tied to supported game behaviour.
Pairs naturally with leaderboards and tips.

image.caption: ZXSnake achievement artwork supports optional progression goals.
